exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Template franchise agreement (2025). Includes Exhibits A-G to the FA. Key provisions: 20-year term (new build), no renewal, arbitration in Charlotte NC, NC governing law, no noncompete, transfer conditions, liquidated damages formula.

exhibits.name: Hotel Technology Agreement
exhibits.notes: Governs technology services including PMS, RMS, CRS. Initial 3-year term with auto 1-year renewals, coterminous with FA. Franchisor can terminate with 10 days notice without cause. Includes Exhibits A (Scope of Services), B (fees/implementation), participation agreements (Canary, etc.).

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Two sets of audited financial statements by Deloitte & Touche LLP. Set 1: FY2024 and FY2023. Set 2: FY2023 and FY2022. Unqualified opinions with Emphasis of Matter (related party transactions). Balance sheets, income statements, changes in member's capital, cash flows, and notes.

exhibits.name: List of EXTENDED STAY AMERICA SELECT SUITES Franchisees as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: 5 operational franchised hotels: 3 in MI (Warren, Farmington Hills, Ann Arbor), 1 in MS (Jackson), 1 in TX (Odessa). Also lists 2 signed not yet open: 1 in FL (Wildwood), 1 in NE (Bellevue). Listed as 'ESA Premier Suites Franchisees' header for the signed-not-open section — possible labeling error or these are dual-brand deals.

exhibits.name: List of EXTENDED STAY AMERICA SELECT SUITES Franchisees Who Left the System as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: None. No franchisees have left the system.

exhibits.name: Brand Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for the Brand Standards Manual (124 pages total per Item 11). Does not include the actual standards content.

exhibits.name: List of State Agencies / Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state regulatory agencies and designated agents for service of process in registration states.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document and Riders to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: State-specific addenda and riders modifying the FDD and Franchise Agreement for various registration states. Contains material overrides to dispute resolution, termination, transfer, and other provisions per state franchise law requirements.

exhibits.name: Franchisee Guaranty
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty form. Spousal liability highlighted as a special risk on the cover page. Required if franchisee is an entity — owners must personally guarantee franchise obligations.

exhibits.name: Form of General Release
exhibits.notes: Standard general release form required upon transfer of franchise. Includes indemnification provisions.

exhibits.name: Form of Asset Purchase Agreement
exhibits.notes: Template APA for purchase of existing hotel owned by ESH Hospitality affiliate. Unusually large exhibit (87 pages). Relevant to the 22 hotels being sold to franchisees as of March 2025. Includes extensive schedules, representations, warranties, and closing conditions.
